get_balance.description: Queries the Go blockchain ledger for the balance of a given address.
get_balance.command: docker compose exec blockchain ./blockchain get_balance {{address}} http://localhost:8080

audit_chain.description: Runs a full integrity scan of the blockchain.
audit_chain.command: docker compose exec blockchain ./blockchain audit_chain http://localhost:8080

chain_info.description: Returns chain metadata (chainId, height, latest hash).
chain_info.command: docker compose exec blockchain ./blockchain chain_info http://localhost:8080
